Founded in 2016, Om Ayurvedic Medical College Hospital and Research Center is a private institute. It is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand. The institute is accredited with CCIM. Om Ayurvedic Medical College Hospital and Research Center provides UG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 1 course across specialisation such as Ayurved. Some of the course offered at this institute include B.A.M.S. Om Ayurvedic Medical College Hospital and Research Center fees is INR 2,45,000. The student intake for these courses is 60. Om Ayurvedic Medical College Hospital and Research Center offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Central University.

review_content.Placements: Currently, I am a 1st year student at Mahatma Gandhi Central University pursuing B.Tech in computer science and engineering. The placement scenario of our university is much better as compared to another central university. The highest salary package offered is 35 LPA and the average salary package offered ranges from 7 LPA - 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata, TCS, Wipro, Amazon, etc. Mostly all students get internships starting from 3rd semester. Top roles offered are junior engineer, manager, and assistant manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our university is decent. Currently, we do not have our permanent campus but in the upcoming few years, we will. Our university provides good facilities with Wi-Fi all over campus, smart board in the classroom, lab facilities, and central library from which students take maximum benefits. Currently hostel is only for girls with best facilities including good mess food, affordable for all, hygiene,24/7 security guard, and transport facilities for traveling from one campus to another. Every year Umang sports fest happens for both teachers and students for the leadership qualities, development of students and to maintain physical fitness.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Central University.

review_content.Placements: Basically, the placement scenario here is above average compared to other central universities. The highest package offered here is by Amazon at a CTC of 36 Lacs, and the average package is around 8-9 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies are Tata, Wipro, TCS, and Mahindra Finance. The top roles offered are Computer Operator and Junior Engineer. Students start getting internships from the 3rd year, and mostly all students get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our university is decent with good infrastructure. Currently, we do not have a permanent campus. Our classrooms are equipped with smart boards, and Wi-Fi with good speed is available all over the campus. Currently, the hostel facilities are only for girls. Transportation facilities are available for students to move from one campus to another. The girls' hostel is equipped with all the basic facilities, good mess food, and security guards 24/7. Every year, a sports event named Umang is celebrated, in which most students take part. On a regular basis, cultural programs are held for the enjoyment of students.

Tech students, and Wi-Fi is available all across our university. There is also a library with a lot of availability of different books. admission_overview.college_name: Mahatma Gandhi Central University Admission 2025: CUET, Eligibility, Fee, Selection Process & Dates

admission_process.title: Mahatma Gandhi Central University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mahatma Gandhi Central University (MGCUB) is offering admissions for the academic session 2025 across various undergraduate, postgraduate, M.Phil., and PhD programmes. The admissions are primarily based on national-level entrance examinations or scores from recognised National Testing Agencies.The University offers a variety of innovative programmes under different schools, including Commerce and Management Sciences, Computational Sciences, Information and Communication Technology, Education, Humanities and Languages, Life Sciences, Physical Sciences, and Social Sciences.

Mahatma Gandhi Central University admission processis based on CUET UG and PG, except for the PG Diploma course. For admission to undergraduate courses like BTech, BCom, and BA the aspiring candidates need to take CUET UG and for the post-graduate courses, candidates need to take CUET PG. Given below is the list of Mahatma Gandhi Central University along with their selection and eligibility criteria:

Some of these charges are payable as one-time fees included in the total course fee. Throughout the course duration, students are required to pay the fees on a semester basis. Below is a table detailing the tuition fees for each course:
Below are the detailed steps to get admission in Mahatma Gandhi Central University:
MGCUB Application Process 2025

Students interested in taking admission in undergraduate, postgraduate, M.Phil., or PhD programmes at MGCUB need to complete the application form related to the relevant entrance exam. Candidates who wants admission in BTech, BCom, and BA courses should apply for the Common University Entrance Test (CUET) UG.
Admission Confirmation
Candidates who successfully clear all the selection rounds can secure their admission by paying the requisite fees as specified by Mahatma Gandhi Central University.

faqs.question: How are the MA Education placements at Mahatma Gandhi Central University Bihar?
faqs.answer: It’s one of the topmost universities in Bihar. The lowest salary package offered by recruiters will be 3.5 Lacs per annum. Also, the highest salary package offered by recruiters will be 16 Lacs per annum.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Mahatma Gandhi Central University - MGCUB?
faqs.answer: Mahatma Gandhi Central University (MGCUB) offers excellent MBA placements. A specialized placement cell at the institution helps students get ready for interviews and makes connections with possible employers. The number of students placed in MBA employment at MGCUB has steadily increased over the last few years. More than 70% of MBA graduates in 2023 were hired by prestigious corporations including Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and TCS. When MBA students are hired by MGCUB, their average annual income is approximately five lacs. In 2023, MGCUB gave the highest compensation possible to MBA students: 35 Lacs annually. Additional services offered to students by the MGCUB placement cell include: Career guidance Help in writing a resume Interview readiness assistance with finding a job

faqs.question: Do students get their ROI after completing MBA from Mahatma Gandhi Central University - MGCUB?
faqs.answer: 1).Based on the research the students who are studying MBA, after completing their courses in Mahatma gandhi Central University, ROI will be calculated based on the fees.ROI is the return on investment. 2).The ROI is calculated by adding the current value of MBA fees amount and minus these cost of investment.This is divided by cost of investment. 3).So, the calue of your investment is the tricky part as an MBA open doors to tangible and intangible.financial and non-financial benefits. 4).In MBA, the last 10 years the ROI was estimated as 325 percent.

description: Mahatma Gandhi Central University cutoff 2025 has been released for several undergraduate and postgraduate courses via CUET UG and CUET PG entrance exams. Candidates seeking admission can check out the exam-wise sections below to view the Mahatma Gandhi Central University CUET cutoff scores. A few more updates are below:

Mahatma Gandhi Central University CUET PG cutoff 2024 has been released for several PG courses. As per the last round of MGCU cutoff 2024, the Master of Business Administration (MBA) is the most competitive course with a cutoff score of 142 for the General AII India category students. The least competitive course is M.A. in Hindi with a CUET PG cutoff score of 20.

CUET PG scores are the deciding criteria for admission to Mahatma Gandhi Central University Post Graduation Courses. MGCU cutoff 2024 has been released for several PG courses. As per the Mahatma Gandhi Central University CUET PG cutoff 2024, the scores ranged between 20 and 142 for the General AII India category students. For the OBC category, Master of Business Administration (MBA) is the most competitive PG course, with a Cutoff score of 94.
Candidates can check some of the important dates related to CUET PG for Mahatma Gandhi Central University admission to the PG courses.
Candidates can view the year-wise consolidated Counselling PDFs for CUET PG for admission to the Mahatma Gandhi Central University PG courses below:

Mahatma Gandhi Central University cutoff 2022 had been released for UG courses in the form of opening and closing ranks. As per the Last Round, the closing ranks varied between 8 and 110 wherein Bachelors of Arts (BA) was highly competitive among General category students under the AI Quota. While the MGCU CSE cutoff 2022 was 19 for the Last Round.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Central University.
reviews.review_text: In our university, the infrastructure and facilities are very good. All classrooms are totally digital. Wi-Fi is also available for students and teachers. Hotel facilities are only available for girls. In the hostel, the food quality is very good. The hostel is fully Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are super cool, but only 2 students per course get the accommodation there, which is again based on how you performed in the 12th. Fees, back then, I paid just Rs. 10,000 per year. The mess food is okay.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Central University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our university is decent. Currently, we do not have our permanent campus but in the upcoming few years, we will. Our university provides good facilities with Wi-Fi all over campus, smart board in the classroom, lab facilities, and central library from which students take maximum benefits. Currently hostel is only for girls with best facilities including good mess food, affordable for all, hygiene,24/7 security guard, and transport facilities for traveling from one campus to ano...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Central University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is decent with good infrastructure. Currently, we do not have a permanent campus. Our classrooms are equipped with smart boards, and Wi-Fi with good speed is available all over the campus. Currently, the hostel facilities are only for girls. Transportation facilities are available for students to move from one campus to another. The girls' hostel is equipped with all the basic facilities, good mess food, and security guards 24/7. Every year, a sports event na...

reviews.review_heading: Good curriculum for GATE.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructures for our department are up to date with more technology. There are 2 computer labs only for B. Tech students, and Wi-Fi is available all across our university. There is also a library with a lot of availability of different books. Now, if we talk about the hostel, the college provides hostel facilities only for girls, but it is expected that they will provide hostels for boys. There is a sports event that occurs each year in January, namely UMANG.

reviews.review_heading: The university is good but not excellent because some things are not provided.
reviews.review_text: We used to study in the branch of MGCU (Mahatma Gandhi Central University) in Motihari, as our main campus is still in progress, which will take around 4-5 years. The college provides a bus, canteen, and medical facilities 24/7, and the classroom has a smartboard, air conditioning, and Wi-Fi. The college also provides hostels only for girls and not boys. It also hosts an annual sport named UMANG every year in which students compete with each other in different sports.

reviews.review_heading: What is MGCU, Motihari, Bihar?
reviews.review_text: The campus is good and peaceful, with good infrastructure. Everything is available on campus, like a big library, fully equipped labs, modern classrooms, Wi-Fi, and CCTV. Hostels are good, and rooms are neat and clean and in good condition. Mess food is good in taste and healthy; they also maintain hygiene. Wi-Fi and CCTV are installed everywhere. Many indoor and outdoor games are also available in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about MGCU, Motihari Bihar .
reviews.review_text: College has good facilities, such as a big library, modern classrooms, sports facilities, Wi-Fi, etc. College provides only girls' hostel. Everything is provided. Mess is good with a hygienic and tasty food. For security, CCTV is installed. Medical facilities are also available. Games for entertainment are provided.

reviews.review_heading: A very good emerging university for B.Teach in CSE at affordable rate.
reviews.review_text: Facilites and infrastructure are currently located on a temporary campus, as our main campus is being built on around 300 acres of land. The temporary campus provides free Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms along with a great library. The quality of books and computers is good. Sports facility is also good and hostel is available for girls only.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best central universities in India because of good placement.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure and they have all facilities on their campus. They have big library, cafe, smart board, Wi-Fi, modern classroom, etc. In our college, hostels are allocated only for girls. Mess is too good and the food is also of good quality and quantity. They also maintain hygiene. They have installed CCTV and Wi-Fi. There are so many indoor and outdoor games available.

reviews.review_heading: Information about Mahatma Gandhi Central University.
reviews.review_text: This college has very good infrastructure. The campus provides all facilities like a big library, cafe, CCTVs, Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, etc. The hostel is allocated only for girls. The mess is very good. The food is also good with the quality and quantity. They also maintain hygiene. They installed CCTVs and Wi-Fi. Many indoor and outdoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college I have seen with the best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Mahatma Gandhi Central University in Motihari, Bihar has several facilities including a library, a computer lab, and a hostel for girls only. Mahatma Gandhi Central University depends on its campus infrastructure and hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Central University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is excellent and campus is very attractive. All facilities are available, including a library, labs, modern classrooms, Wi-Fi in every area, and CCTV installation. College provides a girls' hostel with well-maintained rooms and proper hygiene. The mess food is tasty and offers a variety of options. Medical facilities are available and both indoor and outdoor games are provided for all students.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about Mahatma Gandhi Central University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. Everything is available here like Wi-Fi, a library, modern classrooms, labs, and a hostel. The hostel is available only for girls. It is good in condition. Everything is available in the hostel. The mess food is good and hygienic. Medical facilities are also available for all girls. There are many indoor and outdoor games for students to play like carrom, chess, and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Central University.
reviews.review_text: Mahatma Gandhi Central University operates on a temporary campus, so the infrastructure is not very developed. However, the university provides Wi-Fi access for both students and faculty. Facilities like a library, hostel, and sports amenities are also available at MGCU.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Mahatma Gandhi Central University

Other scholarships cover university rank holders, students with disabilities, minority communities, and SC students.

No, it's not that much expensive as Mahatma Gandhi Central University - MGCUB provide all types of courses with the minimum fees like the fees of B.Tech total one time fee is INR5600 and the hostel fee is INR 9000 per semester. So it depends on you or your income. Mahatma Gandhi Central University- MGCUB is really a good University.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure, really good facilities .

review_content.Placements: They provide training and lab works in the college only as they have their own hospital. They still have not started any placements as the college is newly established and the batch still has not reached to 4th year. But they promise to give best placements after college .
review_content.Infrastructure: The classroom, library and other things are really good The hostel is really good. Too much spacious room Wi-Fi is not available in hostel but it's okay Thry have very big library containing all essential books to read. They have personalised gym also in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Almost 75-80% of students got placed in our course. Sun Pharma, Cipla, etc., are the top recruiting companies. Many government and private jobs are offered to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available but students cannot use them. Students are also not allowed to use mobile phones in classrooms, library, and laboratory. The library is good, and several books are available. The food served in the hostel is good. Air-conditioners are available in our classrooms. Laboratory is available for UG and PG students.
review_content.Faculty: The teaching quality is good. Few of them are Ph.D. scholars. Our course is very professional. There are 2-3 internal exams. Semester exams are conducted every 6-months.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied about my college life.

review_content.Placements: I'm a 4th year student pursuing B.Pharma pharmacy course is newly started department in vydehi institute, so the avg package of course is 1.5lakh per year, many pharma companies are available in Bangalore to recruit. Roles and jobs for pharmacy field is plenty opportunities. We need to choose properly, depends on their interest for e. g ( I'm interested in pharmacology).. .
review_content.Infrastructure: Compare to other departments, pharmacy college is little small and no proper infrastructure and facilities and strictly no extra curricular activities. Quality of the food was good but expensive. Hospital is inside the campus only. Library was small, labs were good and even classroom are good enough.

reviews.review_text:
The classroom, library and other things are really good
The hostel is really good. Too much spacious room Wi-Fi is not available in hostel but it's okay
Thry have very big library containing all essential books to read. They have personalised gym also in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but students cannot use them. Students are also not allowed to use mobile phones in classrooms, library, and laboratory. The library is good, and several books are available. The food served in the hostel is good. Air-conditioners are available in our classrooms. Laboratory is available for UG and PG students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied about my college life.
reviews.review_text: Compare to other departments, pharmacy college is little small and no proper infrastructure and facilities and strictly no extra curricular activities. Quality of the food was good but expensive. Hospital is inside the campus only. Library was small, labs were good and even classroom are good enough.

individual_reviews.title: About the Ultra College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: No placements are provided by the college. Only the marketing companies come to the college and hire the students. Also, no internships are provided by the college. Only the students had to search for internships and jobs on their own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is built in a small area. The classes are decent, and the library is built with abundant books and referrals. The hostel facility is very bad and not worth the money. Also, the hostel feels much higher than the course does.

individual_reviews.title: About the ULTRA OF PAHRMACY.

review_summary.college_name: Solan Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Average college. They can improve.

content.Placements: There are no placement options. This college only provides theoretical knowledge but there is no placement option available. If you want good theoretical knowledge then you can come here but do not hope for any placements or jobs. There will be no stipend during internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is not up to the mark and it's really average. The campus area is small. The mess/canteen only serves mess food. There is no garden or ground. You need to climb everyday on rough terrain to reach the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college for homeopathy.

content.Placements: 90% of students got placed. Almost 95% of students got internships in the course from our college hospital. In BHMS course, primarily qualified individuals as homeopathic doctors, and other roles are research, lecturers, scientists, medical assistants, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. There is a library available where all necessary books and articles are available related to the course. Medical facilities and food quality are good. Mess and canteen is also good. Every year sports week is held which helps students to relax.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied. Infrastructure and facilities are good.

content.Placements: My batch is 2022-2027. Batch capacity is 75. Placement rate is 3.7/5 Salary package offered is 10 LPA-12 LPA. Top recruiting company is Dr. Batra's Homoeopathy. Top roles offered are homeopathic doctor, research scientist, teacher/lecturer, and clinical research associate.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are good. Library is filled with books. Hostel is neat and clean. The quality and quantity of food provided are good. Medical facilities are readily available. Sports and games are held during sports week. Overall, facilities and infrastructure of the college are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Himachal.

content.Placements: Our seniors were placed in very good positions and salaries, and homeopathy is a very good option in medical. SHMCH is the best college for knowledge and study. It is a very good college to learn homeopathy. Placement rate is also good, and many students go.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good enough for studying. Every lab is provided with every equipment, and the hostel is also good, not so bad. Hostel is provided with every facility needed and is safe for girls. Hostel food is also good, and outings are on a weekly basis. We enjoy.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides every possible chance for every student.

content.Placements: We were a batch of 75 students and our batch started in 2017. It is a 4-and-a-half-year degree plus 1 year of internship. Many companies come to our college like Dr. Batra's and other elite homeopathic clinics. We are given a 10 -12 LPA package. Doctors from our course are in the teaching profession and some opt to join clinics while some go for MD.
content.Infrastructure: There are different labs for different subjects. In every lab, there are proper instruments and proper equipment provided. Like there is an anatomy lab consisting of cadavers for dissection, organs are preserved, bones are displayed, the proper skeleton for osteology, and slides for microscopic study.

reviews_list.review_title: Here is the most honest review from a first-year student of SLN Ayurvedic College, Amritsar.

review_content.Placements: Okay, so our college is average, so don’t expect too much. Placements are at an average level.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi sometimes works, sometimes it doesn’t. Our college library is really good, it is the best place for studying and everything. Classrooms infrastructure is not that great, but most B.A.M.S. colleges in Punjab are like this. Hostels food is not that great, but the hostel has good facilities. Sports and games facilities are actually good, and sports meets are conducted every year. There are not many facilities, but most of the basic ones are available. Extracurricular activities like sports are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery(BAMS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This is the best college of ayurveda in Amritsar .

review_content.Placements: As our college has its own hospital so this is the best opportunity for internship students. They do not have to suffer a lot for hospitals. There are separate departments of surgery, panchkarma, parsiti tantra avum obs. So students can practice in tier own hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is library in our college. Labs are provided. No Wi-Fi is provided for students. As hostel is not included in college, hostel is far away from college. That is in hospital area. Hostel canteen is good. Medical facilities are good in college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery(BAMS) - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Very much satisfied as I enjoyed my study in college with my batch mates.

review_content.Placements: There was a batch of 50 students in our course. The degree we get from this is BAMS. Whereas the study matters that was based on Ayurveda alongside a competitive study of Modern Science. The students get recruitment in hospital, however some of them opened their own clinics too. The top role offered was of a physician.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a clinical laboratory as well as different facilities for Ayurvedic physiotherapy. The library has a very good collection of books for reference purposes. The hostel facility is not up to the mark. You need accommodation at nearby room providers as PG. So you have to manage food on your own.

paragraphs: The admission to Institute of Health Sciences, Bhubaneswar is through IMAT exam conducted by the college. Candidates have to fill an online application form and appear for the exam, followed by counselling.

Application Process
Students can fill-out the application form on the official website of college. Candidates have to appear for IMAT exam, conducted by Institute of Health Sciences, Bhubaneswar.
Counselling Session
After going through the student profile, the academic counsellors will reach out to the students. Candidates will have to participate in the counselling session.
Fee Payment
Candidates can secure their seat by paying amount of INR 25000. Applicants should et their documents verified and pay the fees.

At the UG level, FIEM Kolkata offers BE/BTech, BCA, BBA, and BSc, and at the PG level, the Future Institute of Engineering and Management offers MBA/PGDM, MCA, MHA, and MSc courses. Candidates can check the FIEM Kolkata courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table given below:

faqs.answer: A:    FIEM Kolkata admission 2024 is primarily entrance-based. The institute offers MBA and BTech, BCA, MCA and other popular courses at the UG and PG level. FIEM Kolkata accepting exams are WBJEE JEE Main WBJEE JELET, MAT etc. for providing admission to BTech and MBA courses.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Future Institute of Engineering and Management for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    FIEM accepts various entrance exam scores for various courses, the entrance exam accepted for B.Tech are:WBJEE (West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination)JEE Main (Joint Entrance Examination Main)JELET (Joint Entrance Examination for Lateral Entry). The candidate must also have completed 10+2 education from a recognised board with minimum 50% aggregate for securing a seat in B.Tech.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Future Institute of Engineering and Management accept for admission to B.Tech?

faqs.answer: A:    Admissions at Future Institute of Engineering and Management are based on entrance exams, Example for engineering students are expected to score a good rank in entrance exams like WBJEE or JEE Mains But for MBA With scores of CMAT/JEMAT/MAT, Marks in graduation also plays a important role in taking admission in the college
faqs.question: Are admissions at Future Institute of Engineering and Management entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: A:    Undergraduate and graduate admissions are available at the Future Institute of Engineering and Management in Kolkata. Admission to FIEM Kolkata is determined via entrance. To be considered for admission to FIEM Kolkata for a BTech program, students must first take the West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination (WBJEE) and then undergo WBJEE counseling. The admission to the BTech programme at FIEM Kolkata is contingent upon the JEE Main result. MAT/JEMAT is a requirement for applicants seeking admission to the FIEM Kolkata MBA program. Shortlisted candidates have to attend the JEMAT counseling session. Candidates get admitted to FIEM Kolkata MCA programs based on their results in the West Bengal Joint Examination for Masters in Computer Applications (WB JECA). Later, WBJECA centralised counselling is conducted to fill the seats.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Reliable academics and decent placements with good overall facilities

review_content.Placements: 35 to 50 percent of students usually get placed at FIEM Kolkata, with CSE and IT often recording higher placement rates. The highest packages reach around 9 to 12 LPA, while most students get offers between 3 and 5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, Infosys, and Capgemini visit the campus regularly. Many students also secure internships in IT and consulting roles through these recruiters.
review_content.Infrastructure: FIEM Kolkata provides a good set of facilities for engineering students. Classrooms are clean and have projectors, and the campus offers Wi-Fi which may vary in speed at times. Labs for CSE, IT, and core branches are equipped well enough for regular practicals. The library has a strong collection of books, journals, and digital resources. The campus includes auditoriums and seminar halls for events and workshops. Sports facilities cover football, cricket, and indoor games like table tennis and basketball.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, a good college. You should come here.

review_content.Placements: 95 percent of students were placed last year. The placement is very good, and many companies come here, like TCS, Infosys, etc. The highest package is 30 LPA, and sometimes it's more than this average package, which is 7 LPA-8 LPA, but the below-average package is 2 LPA-3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and friendly. Overall very good and very nice. The department has actively engaged students through hands-on training, field internships, and specialized coaching for slow learners. The use of innovative pedagogical techniques is also increasing. So many faculty members are there. Good teachers. They help you as they can, and the students participating in class discussions and group work, they help students to work on balancing a long-term project and any confusion about the assignment, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Future Institute of Engineering and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is moderate, but it is still good.

content.Placements: According to college data, 70% of students got on-campus placement. The highest package from my course was around 6 LPA, and the lowest was around 1.5 LPA. Many companies came to recruit from our college, but the top ones were Amazon, TCS, Infosys, etc. Around 6–7 students get placed at Amazon from our department every year.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my course/department was very good. What I liked about my college was a lot. We had dedicated 2 labs only for our department students. A seminar room was also present where students could discuss events and spend their time. There were also dedicated Wi-Fi and a single but well-maintained library. Although hostel students said the rooms were not that good. The food sometimes came out to be bad. The canteen food was definitely bad, and the medical facilities were not very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.

content.Placements: Approximately 80 percent of students got placed. The average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata, Career Comfort, Wipro, Huron, Zensar, Tech Mahindra, Teleperformance, Accenture, Cognizant, etc. Internship is less as we have got more job opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: FIEM's 5-acre Kolkata campus features more than 32 smart classrooms, over 82 labs, and a 60k-book library. It offers 3 AC auditoriums, Wi-Fi, sports grounds, and a canteen. This eco-friendly hub blends modern tech with top amenities for students. I was not in the hostel, but I heard from others that it is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Reliable academics and decent placements with good overall facilities

content.Placements: 35 to 50 percent of students usually get placed at FIEM Kolkata, with CSE and IT often recording higher placement rates. The highest packages reach around 9 to 12 LPA, while most students get offers between 3 and 5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, Infosys, and Capgemini visit the campus regularly. Many students also secure internships in IT and consulting roles through these recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: FIEM Kolkata provides a good set of facilities for engineering students. Classrooms are clean and have projectors, and the campus offers Wi-Fi which may vary in speed at times. Labs for CSE, IT, and core branches are equipped well enough for regular practicals. The library has a strong collection of books, journals, and digital resources. The campus includes auditoriums and seminar halls for events and workshops. Sports facilities cover football, cricket, and indoor games like table tennis and basketball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, a good college. You should come here.

content.Placements: 95 percent of students were placed last year. The placement is very good, and many companies come here, like TCS, Infosys, etc. The highest package is 30 LPA, and sometimes it's more than this average package, which is 7 LPA-8 LPA, but the below-average package is 2 LPA-3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and friendly. Overall very good and very nice. The department has actively engaged students through hands-on training, field internships, and specialized coaching for slow learners. The use of innovative pedagogical techniques is also increasing. So many faculty members are there. Good teachers. They help you as they can, and the students participating in class discussions and group work, they help students to work on balancing a long-term project and any confusion about the assignment, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the placement opportunities and the faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed from my college. The placement cell was very active and efficient. Wipro was one of the major recruiters. Most students secured jobs in companies like Infosys, Mindtree, and TCS. The faculty members of the ECE department were excellent. The highest package offered was around 8-9 LPA, while the average package was between 3.5 to 4 LPA. The roles were mainly for management trainee, analyst, and software developer positions. Overall, this college is very good for placements in ECE, CSE, and IT streams.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average, and the building condition is acceptable. Hostel facilities are not available on the college campus, but paying guest accommodations are available nearby. The labs are excellent and well-maintained, with practical sessions taken very seriously. The library is outstanding and a great place to study. Wi-Fi facility is available. There is a small canteen where snacks are served, but the playground is quite small.

admission_overview.college_name: Future Institute of Engineering and Management Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Application & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: FIEM Kolkata admission 2025 is primarily entrance-based. The institute offers MBA and BTech, BCA, MCA and other popular courses at the UG and PG level. FIEM Kolkata accepting exams areWBJEEJEE MainWBJEE JELET,MATetc. for providing admission to BTech and MBA courses. Given below are the key highlights forFIEM Kolkataadmission:
Check below theFIEM Kolkata coursesalong with their eligibility, fees and selection criteria:

English, Physics, Mathematics, and any one of Chemistry, Biotechnology, Biology, Computer Science, Computer Application, or a Technical Vocational Subject. Individual pass marks, both in theory and practical where applicable, are mandatory, with a minimum of 45% in class 12
WBJEE,JEE Main,WBJEE, JELET
Bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate.

Candidates seeking admission to FIEM Kolkata must take any of these entrance exams, i.e. WBJEE,JEE Main,WBJEE, JELET. Candidates must apply for any one of the aforementioned entrance exams through their official website.
Step 1: FIEM Kolkata Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission to their FIEM Kolkata must fill out the application form for the accepted entrance exam such as MAT, JEMAT, WBJEE, and JECA through their official website by paying the required application fee for final submission.
Step 2: FIEM Kolkata Selection Criteria 2025
FIEM Kolkata admission is entirely entrance exam based, candidates based on their scores in WBJEE/ JECA/ JMAT/ MAT will be shortlisted for Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI) rounds.
Step 3: FIEM Kolkata Final Seat Allotment 2025
Candidates who qualify for the GD and PI rounds are required to report to the admission cell at FIEM Kolkata for document verification andtuition feepayment for final seat allotment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is moderate, but it is still good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my course/department was very good. What I liked about my college was a lot. We had dedicated 2 labs only for our department students. A seminar room was also present where students could discuss events and spend their time. There were also dedicated Wi-Fi and a single but well-maintained library. Although hostel students said the rooms were not that good. The food sometimes came out to be bad. The canteen food was definitely bad, and the medical facilities were not very go...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: FIEM's 5-acre Kolkata campus features more than 32 smart classrooms, over 82 labs, and a 60k-book library. It offers 3 AC auditoriums, Wi-Fi, sports grounds, and a canteen. This eco-friendly hub blends modern tech with top amenities for students. I was not in the hostel, but I heard from others that it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Reliable academics and decent placements with good overall facilities
reviews.review_text: FIEM Kolkata provides a good set of facilities for engineering students. Classrooms are clean and have projectors, and the campus offers Wi-Fi which may vary in speed at times. Labs for CSE, IT, and core branches are equipped well enough for regular practicals. The library has a strong collection of books, journals, and digital resources. The campus includes auditoriums and seminar halls for events and workshops. Sports facilities cover football, cricket, and indoor games like table tennis and b...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college. You should come here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the placement opportunities and the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average, and the building condition is acceptable. Hostel facilities are not available on the college campus, but paying guest accommodations are available nearby. The labs are excellent and well-maintained, with practical sessions taken very seriously. The library is outstanding and a great place to study. Wi-Fi facility is available. There is a small canteen where snacks are served, but the playground is quite small.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities and infrastructure are really very good, and the teachers are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: In the labs and library, there are ACs, and the classrooms are very neat and clean. The internet connection, i.e., Wi-Fi, is very good, and we never face any issues while doing any class in the lab. Almost every sport is played in our college on our FIEM ground. Every food is available at the canteen, and the quality is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college and all types of sports are available. Placements are excellent.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent, and all classrooms are neat and clean. Also have smart board classroom. Future Institution of Engineering and Management College also has a canteen. Food is awesome and quality full. All things are available in BCA example, Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, and library.

reviews.review_heading: College was good in placement, but now not like that much.
reviews.review_text: This college provides good and not-so-good lab facilities. Some labs are well-equipped with modern technology and some are not. College has no personal hostel. Library is very good, every type of book is available. It is big library. Outside of college, there are 4 private hostels.

reviews.review_heading: A good review of FIEM.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for your course/department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are outstanding. The quality of the facilities in hostel and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games all are very good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for engineering and totally worth it.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are quite good, but Wi-Fi is too slow. But all the facilities in the college are good enough for study. The food in the campus canteen is not so good. There are several sports activities to do on campus. There are also indoor games and tournaments on campus.

reviews.review_heading: About Fiem College & Campus Life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility was not there for us, not sure about if it was there now or not. Labs and classrooms are average with less facilities. Library was quite large and had a great ambiance too. Wi-Fi facility was there in the library for all. Overall, it was average infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Future Institute of Engineering and Management
reviews.review_text: Its average and not so great. The infrastructure is decent, not good enough but not bad at all. Canteen looks great from inside, food is not at all good. Basically canteen is used for stationary purpose now, they have all the things which you will be needed for your course.

reviews.review_heading: Ups and downs came in the 4 years.
reviews.review_text: There's no college hostel. Students from outside Kolkata stay in nearby PGs. There's no free Wi-Fi for students. The library is good, and you get free Wi-Fi there only. There are 4 clubs in the college, which arrange amazing fests. The canteen is not good, as per me.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Future Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Choose wisely as your future depends on it.
reviews.review_text: Our college has spacious and well-ventilated classrooms equipped with projectors. Some classrooms have smart boards. In some classrooms, projectors don't work. There is a networking lab and a cloud computing lab but equipment needs some upgradation. The college has separate hostels for boys and girls with single, double, and triple-sharing rooms. Mess facilities are available but their meals are not very delicious.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Future Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A good campus for all purposes.
reviews.review_text: In our college, classrooms, a lab, and other things are very good and well-maintained. Our college should improve the canteen food and the main entrance of the college. There is no hostel on this campus.

college_info.college_name: Future Institute of Engineering and Management Scholarship Details

paragraphs: BTech in Electronics and Communication Engineering is an AICTE-approved programme at FIEM. Candidates, who have passed class 12th with a minimum of 45% with a valid score in JEE Mains or WBJEE are eligible to pursue the programme. Candidates have to pay an approximately fees of INR 4.06 Lacs for the programme.

Yes, FIEM does scholarships for BSc students. Majorly the scholarships are offered to BSc students on the basis of their merit, the scores they achieved in their higher senior secondary, and their entrance exam. Additionally, the college offers minorities scholarships, the Swami Vivekananda Scholarship, and other government-aided scholarships and freeships. Before applying for the scholarships, candidates must complete the eligibility requirements and apply through the official website of the college.

Future Institute of Engineering and Management offers scholarship only for the students who have done well in their higher secondary and graduation examinations. Students opting for B.Sc in Media Science and M.Sc in Media Science will be able to grab the opportunity of gaining a scholarship from the institution. Scholarship worth Rs 25,000 will be given to the deserving candidates. To avail the scholarship, candidates must score more than 80% in the 12th board exam if they are opting for the B.Sc course. For the ones aspiring for the M.Sc course can get the scholarship only if they scored 60% and above in their graduation along with a good academic track record.

The institution also provides students with an education loan. With this, the institution intends to support the students with their financial problems so that they are able to study their desired course without any problems. For this, FIEM has joined hands with HDFC Bank, to provide education loan to the students. In order to take this sanctioned education loan, students need to produce certain specified documents.

Yes, FIEM does scholarships for BBA students. Majorly the scholarships are offered to BBA students on the basis of their merit, the scores they achieved in their higher senior secondary, and their entrance exam. Additionally, the college offers minorities scholarships, the Swami Vivekananda Scholarship, and other government-aided scholarships and freeships. Before applying for the scholarships, candidates must complete the eligibility requirements and apply through the official website of the college.

course_faqs.question: Is the MBA degree from Monad University valid?
course_faqs.answer: Monad University being established in the year 2010, holds the right to host a course programme such as MBA and after successful completion of course, the University is authorized to issue the completion degree of respective courses in the names of concerned students. Therefore, yes the MBA degree from Monad University is valid.

course_faqs.answer: Monad University has organised the scholarship programme for all the students studying in this university. This university aims to promote education for students despite of financial constraints by providing fee relxation. The meritorious students are entitled for this scholarship. Students from the reserved categories can also avail the scholarship. The students should be eligible for scholarship according to the university rules.

course_faqs.question: Is MBA at Monad University worth investing for?
course_faqs.answer: The Monad University is approved by various bodies including UGC. It was established in the year 2010. The placement record of the college is decent. The alumni base of the institute includes more than 4,500 students according to their official website. The choice of institution is subject to personal ambition and requirements. The experience may vary from person to person hence, it is always better to make informed decision.

admission_overview.college_name: Monad University Admission 2025: Dates, Eligibility, Application Process, Fee

paragraphs: Monad University admission to its various courses is done on the basis of the academic scores of students. The university offers UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral programmes. There are 77 academic courses that are offered through eight departments. Monad University also offers Polytechnic diploma, Certificate, and Advanced Certificate courses in collaboration with Construction Development Industry Council (CIDC).
Monad University offers over 77 courses through eight schools. Candidates can check below the key highlights forMonad University admissions:

Monad University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
How to apply?
https://www.monad.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

The university offers admission to courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must fulfil the course-specific eligibility to apply for their preferred course. Below are popularMonad University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Monad University admissions begins with the registration process. Candidates need to select their preferred course and fill out the application form for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in Monad University:
STEP 1: Monad University Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply on the official website of the university. Aspirants will first need to register and then fill out the application form for their preferred course.
STEP 2: Selection
Applicants are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for admissions. The institute evaluates the application form of the candidates to confirm their eligibility.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once selected, aspirants need to pay theMonad University feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, CBSE 12th, ISC, UP 12th
courses_data.description: Monad University provides a Full Time BE/BTech programme that takes four years to complete. Interested students needs to score good marks in the JEE Main/MHT CET exam for admission. Here is more information about the eligibility requirements, selection criteria, and fees for Monad University BE/BTech admission in 2025.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in BTech at Monad University?
faqs.answer: No, the admission in BTech course at Monad University is a merit based system. The students should fulfill the eligibility criteria in order to get admission in the university. Usually the class 12 exam results are set as the benchmark with minimum requirement of 50% aggregate. Relaxation of 5% is given to the candidates of reserved categories.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission in BTech at Monad University?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for taking admission in Monad University BTech programme is separate based on the course type. The following points reflects the criteria as set by the institute:·Forregular BTech programthe students must have minimum aggregate of 45% in their class 12 (40% for reserved categories) with any one of the subjects namely Chemistry, Biotechnology, Biology, Technical Vocational Subject.·Eligibility criteria for students withdiploma degreeis set at minimum of 45% aggregate (40%

faqs.question: Can I join Monad University directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, Monad University offers direct direct admission to candidates. One need to fill out the application form and pay INR 7,500 for direct admission at the university. Aspirants are selected for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Monad University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Monad University admissions are currently open. Candidates can download the application form or apply online. The university considers the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for admission to UG and PG courses.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to B.A at Monad University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university provides direct admission offer. The aspirants can get the application form by payingINR 7,500from the central admission cell, Monad University, Block-C, Ground Floor. Students can then fill out the application form and submit it at the mentioned address.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.Sc at Monad University?
faqs.answer: Candidates have to pay the application fee amount to submit Monad University BSc application form successfully. The fee amount is INR 7,500 . Aspirants can pay the fee amount in either online mode (credit card/debit card/net banking) or via demand draft in favour of "Monad University" payable at Hapur. It is advisable that candidates keep the fee payment receipt safe for future references.

faqs.question: What are the government job profiles available for BSc graduates?
faqs.answer: Because of their prestige, job security, competitive pay, and enticing benefits, public sector jobs are still in high demand in India. With a bachelor's degree in science, a candidate can apply for a wide range of public sector positions that complement their technical expertise and analytical abilities. A bachelor's degree in any scientific field opens doors to research jobs at national labs and institutes. For BSc graduates, the following are some common government job profiles : Government Job Profiles for BSc Graduates Research Scientist Clinical Research Specialist Lab Technician Biochemist Assistant Nurse Forest Department- IFS Officer FCI- Trainee RBI Grade B Officer LIC- AAO SBI PO Note: The information is sourced from external sites and may vary.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, placements, building and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are amazing, and the building is very big and clean. The canteen is also very clean and sports and games are conducted every 6 months. The sports ground is very large and clean, and it is very green. There are many plants on our ground, and there is another field for agriculture.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also quite good. Faculty members in our university are good. The infrastructure is the best. The agricultural department building has Wi-Fi, labs, and a very large library. The university infrastructure is good. The social life at the university is friendly, with positive behavior from teachers and staff.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent learning experience with industry-relevant curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers state-of-the-art facilities, including Wi-Fi, hi-tech computer labs, and modern classrooms. Library is digitally automated with over 22,000 books and journals. Hostel provides comfortable accommodation with separate blocks for boys and girls. The mess and canteen serve hygienic and quality food. Medical facilities are available 24/7. Sports and games facilities include a gym, yoga, and meditation rooms, as well as courts for volleyball, basketball, and more. Overall, the in...

reviews.review_heading: Monad University is too good for students; teachers' behavior is like friends.
reviews.review_text: The faculties in our university are good, and the infrastructure is the best. The Agricultural department building has WiFi, labs, and a very large library. The university's infrastructure is good, and the social life at the university is friendly, with positive behavior from teachers and staff.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hapur B.Ed College Monad.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is nice and fabulous facilities are provided by the campus to the students such as Wi-Fi connectivity, laboratory, Library, smart classes, sports activities, annual functions, etc. The quality of the canteen food and hostel mess both is good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure college of Hapur district.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good and well maintained. Class is well furnished, neat and clean. Wi-Fi, library, labs, games and extracurricular activities and annual fest are organised. Hostel facility was also good enough. Canteen food is also good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Good graduation degree college of UP.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good and well maintained. Neat and clean classroom, huge library, well maintained labs, Wi-Fi connection, sports facilities, and annual function was also organised. Hostel facility was good and well maintained. Gym and park both available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for Diploma in Hapur.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the best facilities for students such as a huge library, well-maintained labs, neat and clean classrooms and smart classrooms too. Wi-Fi connection is available. Hostel facilities are good enough, and the food available in the canteen is superb.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for Diploma in hapur district .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the institute is good where we get all the facilities such as Wi-Fi connection, Library and labs available, games and extra curricular activities are also once in a month done. Hostel facility is also good enough due to good food availability in canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review for engineering college of Hapur- monad University .
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good where we get all the good facilities such as library, Wi-Fi, labs, games and extra curricular activities done. Hostel facilities is also good enough where we find good canteen food and medical facilities too in case of emergency.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure of our university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university was good and well-maintained. They provided facilities like Wi-Fi for online sessions, smart classrooms, well-maintained laboratories, and a big library filled with many books. The hostel is also good. The food served in the canteen is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure college of Hapur.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good where all the facilities are available. Wi-Fi connection on campus, huge library, and hostel facility is also good there. Canteen food is also hygienic and more variety is available there. Gym is available in hostel. Games and sports teams organised the session around once in a month.

reviews.review_heading: All the teachers are well educated and professional.
reviews.review_text: All the classes are well maintained, near and clean with smart and projector based classes. So many courses offered by the monad University. Wi-Fi, library available in the campus, games, extra curricular activities done by the students on monthly basis.

reviews.review_heading: Review for monad University .
reviews.review_text: College offers good environment and infrastructure facilities. Library is great and from there you can issue books for home. Games, extra curricular activities or competition and annual functions are also conducted. Campus is huge and the location is very beautiful. Workshop and hostel facility were also available there.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average university.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are neat and clean. The library is huge and a good amount of books are available in our course and you can take books to your home. The infrastructure of the university is good. Decent food variety and quality of food are available at the canteen. Medical facilities are also available.

description: Bhima Bhoi Medical College and Hospital , Balangir cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Bhima Bhoi Medical College and Hospital , Balangir NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 21331 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Bhima Bhoi Medical College and Hospital , Balangir MBBS cutoff 2025 was 21331 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 21367 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Bhima Bhoi Medical College and Hospital , Balangir accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. Bhima Bhoi Medical College and Hospital , Balangir accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MS course. For the MS specialisations, the most challenging one was MS in Orthopaedics, with a round 3 closing rank of 8609 for the General AI category.

review_summary.college_name: Karnataka Ayurveda Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My BAMS life college story.

content.Placements: There are total 100 members. But they will not give any placements only internships will be provided. The highest package in our college is 15 LPA. As this is a medical course, job offers depend on our practical knowledge. After B.A.M.S. we can get into various medical fields.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is too bad, not too fancy. They have not maintained toilets well even the benches are old, and there is no campus. Hostel is an old building and even small rooms in that 4 people should stay in one room. About food, it is too bad.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Average academic life but the advantage or the usp is the location and academics.

content.Placements: Placements are not an option in medical but they give a through medical knowledge. All the ayurveda professionals with high qualifications are teachers here they help guide through various stages and help you get through every obstacles and thoroughly help every time .
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided and all the functions are conducted very well with academic and all cultural activities every year it conducts ayur Utsav and graduation day with sports day and various other functions such as freshers are conducted.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: KAMC where you get what you need.

content.Placements: In the medical field, there are no placements. You get what you learn. This has been proved in the college and with all the practical experience that you get here. You are more prone to become a good doctor and also a responsible doctor or a responsible vaidya.
content.Infrastructure: The college might seem little not to fit to get into the campus life, but offers all amenities that are required for fulfilling medical students' needs. You are offered every facility from the college and management, they also have canteen and parking.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching and support institute .

content.Placements: Fifteen Lacs in average per year course Bams course along with post graduation is provided. Where undergraduate is of 5.5years Along with internship Post graduation is of 2.5years Placement according to the percentage and internship practice Bams.
content.Infrastructure: There and multiple departments which are needed for the course like in 1st year 5 departments Second year six departments and final year 10 departments well-equipped laboratory and fine classroom Canteen in college ground floor Sports during sports events .

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This is our college life.

content.Placements: Some of the students are placed from our college. People get into internships based on their interest and convenience. Most of them prefer their hometown as the number of patients is lower; they put us in different hospitals for practice. Overall, it is a better place.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not up to the mark; the campus is not vast; it is not having any extra space. Even the hostel is not big, but that won't disturb you. You can stay comfortable, but the amount of food is restricted, and you can't ask for more. No medical facilities; we have to go on our own if we are not well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Information Technology (IT) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good. You get every chance to improve yourself.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students got placed in our college. The highest package offered in CSE is 48 lacs. The lowest package offered is 2.5 lacs, although the average package lies between 3 to 5 lacs. Top recruiting companies are Three Meadows PVT Limited, Samsung, HCL Teach, etc. 70% of students get internship in their electives course in Softpro, Tripjack, etc. Top roles offered by the company are software development, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are very good. Labs are fully updated, and classrooms are air-conditioned. The library is fully air-conditioned as well and you can study 24 hrs because it will provide access to the students for the books and reading rooms as well. The facilities or qualities of the hostel are very decent. The food quality is good. Medical facilities are very good because Sharda University itself is a hospital named Sharda Hospital. Sports like basketball, cricket, and volleyball are present so sports facilities are quite good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My experience at Sharda offers a great campus and greater opportunities.

review_content.Placements: Around 77% of students get placed in my course. In the academic year 2025–26. The highest package is 1.6 crore, the lowest is 3.2 LPA, and the average package is 5–6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, HCL, Three Meadows, Samsung, and Garuda UAV. Around 60% of students get internships at companies like UBI, Amazon, OneBanc, etc. The top roles in my course include SDE, Business Analyst, Data Scientist, Front-End Developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch, and facilities like Wi-Fi, clean drinking water, and smartboards are available. Labs have MAC PCs, and the lab staff is cooperative. The classrooms have ACs and smartboards for fast learning. The library has a policy of giving books for 2 weeks without any charges. The hostels have laundry, mess, housekeeping services, emergency medical room, etc. The food quality in the hostel mess is decent, and 4 meals are provided. The campus has sports facilities like a basketball court, a huge football ground, a cricket ground, and various badminton courts. There is also a gym on campus.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the SET Sharda University transportation fee for BSc students?
overview_faqs.answer: Candiates opting for SET Sharda University transportation facility have to pay the facility cost. It shall be same for BSc and other course students. As per official website, the transportation fee for Noida is INR 52,000. Students can also get in touch with admission office for more details.

overview_faqs.question: What is the SET Sharda University BSc fee refund policy?
overview_faqs.answer: Sharda School of Engineering and Technology can follow guidelines of Sharda University for BSc fee refund. The university follow UGC refund policy. Students have to fill out the fee refund form and submit it along with the mandatory documents. Then the guardians are required to visit the campus and meet with the officials about withdrawal and refund policy.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the SET Sharda University BSc in CS tuition fees?
overview_faqs.answer: Sharda School of Engineering and Technology BSc in Computer Science tuition fee is INR 3.59 lakh. This is the total course fee for three years. The fee structure can include tuition fee, security deposit, etc. Its need to be noted that the given fee is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is subject to revision and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: Sharda School of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sharda School of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: In the year 2024, 85 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered was 40 LPA, and the lowest package offered was 3 LPA. Infosys and many more companies visit the college for recruitment. Top roles offered in BCA (AI/ML) are data scientist, AI engineer, machine learning engineer, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a fully Wi-Fi campus and well-maintained infrastructure for BCA/ BCA (AI/ML), and also for other students. It has well-structured labs with a high configuration system. Classrooms have AC. I will never see such a big library in my life. The canteen is okay. The food served is average, like all messes. The university organises sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My review of Sharda University, Noida.

content.Placements: Around 60 percent of students enrolled in the same course I chose i.e., BCA. The highest salary package offered this year was around 19 LPA and the average package offered IS around 6-7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered this year is around 4-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for this course are ISCO, Airtel, and HCL.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure in our department are very good with full AC classes including smart boards to study which works as whiteboards and PDFs. Videos are also played for better understanding. The hostel quality is very good and clean with big rooms. Mess food is decent, not that good. Canteen and medical facilities are better than other colleges because there is much stuff available for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Information Technology (IT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is good. You get every chance to improve yourself.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed in our college. The highest package offered in CSE is 48 lacs. The lowest package offered is 2.5 lacs, although the average package lies between 3 to 5 lacs. Top recruiting companies are Three Meadows PVT Limited, Samsung, HCL Teach, etc. 70% of students get internship in their electives course in Softpro, Tripjack, etc. Top roles offered by the company are software development, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are very good. Labs are fully updated, and classrooms are air-conditioned. The library is fully air-conditioned as well and you can study 24 hrs because it will provide access to the students for the books and reading rooms as well. The facilities or qualities of the hostel are very decent. The food quality is good. Medical facilities are very good because Sharda University itself is a hospital named Sharda Hospital. Sports like basketball, cricket, and volleyball are present so sports facilities are quite good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Sharda offers a great campus and greater opportunities.

content.Placements: Around 77% of students get placed in my course. In the academic year 2025–26. The highest package is 1.6 crore, the lowest is 3.2 LPA, and the average package is 5–6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, HCL, Three Meadows, Samsung, and Garuda UAV. Around 60% of students get internships at companies like UBI, Amazon, OneBanc, etc. The top roles in my course include SDE, Business Analyst, Data Scientist, Front-End Developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch, and facilities like Wi-Fi, clean drinking water, and smartboards are available. Labs have MAC PCs, and the lab staff is cooperative. The classrooms have ACs and smartboards for fast learning. The library has a policy of giving books for 2 weeks without any charges. The hostels have laundry, mess, housekeeping services, emergency medical room, etc. The food quality in the hostel mess is decent, and 4 meals are provided. The campus has sports facilities like a basketball court, a huge football ground, a cricket ground, and various badminton courts. There is also a gym on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Sharda University - A hub of growth, innovation, and excellence.

content.Placements: The placement of our current batch of CSE 2025 is 88%, which is fair if we keep the students with backlogs in mind. The highest package is 1.6 crores per annum off-campus, the lowest would be 4.5 LPA, and the average would be around 6 LPA-7 LPA. Recruiting companies are Accenture, Deloitte, IBM, HCLtech, Samsung, Infosys, 3 Meadows, Josh Technologies, etc. Roles offered are SDE, Front-end developer, back-end developer, ML engineer, cloud engineer, data engineer, data scientist, data analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are great, they have amazing facilities Wi-Fi, laundry, and sports. You can enjoy sports at night, they might say that you have to be in the hostel after 10:00 PM but it's just on paper. I myself used to play badminton from 11:00 PM to 3:00 AM at night, with no strictness, and chill atmosphere.

admission_overview.title: SET Sharda University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sharda School of Engineering and Technology admission 2026 is entrance based. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses. The institute offers more than 11 courses, such as BTech, MTech, MCA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers doctorate, diploma, integrated and certificate courses. These courses cover the domains of Science, Engineering, Computer Application etc. The mode of study for all courses is full time and offline. To get admission to Sharda School of Engineering and Technology, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria as per respective courses. The application process at Sharda School of Engineering and Technology is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about Sharda School of Engineering and Technology course admission 2026.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to B.Tech at Sharda School of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: To get admission to BTech at Sharda University, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, which is to pass Class 10 with 60% aggregate & Class 12 with a minimum of 60% to 70% aggregate (60% aggregate in PCM Computer Science/PCB for Biotechnology (without any gap between Class 10 & Class 12 and 50% aggregate in Maths). Sharda University BTech admission is entrance-based. Students need to qualify for eitherSUAT or JEE Main(All India rank of up to 3 lakh) entrance exams with a valid score. The final selection is done based on the score of the respective entrance exam and the performance of candidates in the Personal Interview (PI) round. Those who apply via SUAT scores are required to appear for a PI round conducted at the School of Engineering Technology. Candidates who applied via JEE Main score are exmepted from both SUAT and PI round.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for M.Tech at Sharda School of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Depending on the specialisation you select, there are different requirements for theSharda School of Engineering and Technology (SSET) M.Tech programme.A minimum of 60% in a relevant engineering discipline should be earned for a B.E. or B.Tech degree.To be admitted, you must have passed the Sharda University Admission Test (SUAT) or GATE/NET.You must to possess a legitimate scorecard from the entrance examination you took.
