sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Hockey Ground

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sharda School of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a fully Wi-Fi campus and well-maintained infrastructure for BCA/ BCA (AI/ML), and also for other students. It has well-structured labs with a high configuration system. Classrooms have AC. I will never see such a big library in my life. The canteen is okay. The food served is average, like all messes. The university organises sports.

reviews.review_heading: My review of Sharda University, Noida.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in our department are very good with full AC classes including smart boards to study which works as whiteboards and PDFs. Videos are also played for better understanding. The hostel quality is very good and clean with big rooms. Mess food is decent, not that good. Canteen and medical facilities are better than other colleges because there is much stuff available for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. You get every chance to improve yourself.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good. Labs are fully updated, and classrooms are air-conditioned. The library is fully air-conditioned as well and you can study 24 hrs because it will provide access to the students for the books and reading rooms as well. The facilities or qualities of the hostel are very decent. The food quality is good. Medical facilities are very good because Sharda University itself is a hospital named Sharda Hospital. Sports like basketball, cricket, and volleyba...

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Sharda offers a great campus and greater opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is top-notch, and facilities like Wi-Fi, clean drinking water, and smartboards are available. Labs have MAC PCs, and the lab staff is cooperative. The classrooms have ACs and smartboards for fast learning. The library has a policy of giving books for 2 weeks without any charges. The hostels have laundry, mess, housekeeping services, emergency medical room, etc. The food quality in the hostel mess is decent, and 4 meals are provided. The campus has sports facilities like a bask...

reviews.review_heading: Sharda University - A hub of growth, innovation, and excellence.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are great, they have amazing facilities Wi-Fi, laundry, and sports. You can enjoy sports at night, they might say that you have to be in the hostel after 10:00 PM but it's just on paper. I myself used to play badminton from 11:00 PM to 3:00 AM at night, with no strictness, and chill atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: College is best if you study here. They offer placements too.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the best. Library is premium, it feels like you are sitting abroad. It has the best infrastructure among the best universities in the country.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, good facilities, well-equipped staff and designed classrooms.
reviews.review_text: Labs, a library, and classrooms are well-connected and maintained. Hostel and bus services are good for students who stay nearby or stay in a hostel. Students in the hostel often have good food. There is a clean mess and rooms by helpers.

reviews.review_heading: Really great development of Sharda University post covid.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is cool as it can get. Even got an amazing hackathon center where I spent my college life the best 24 hours in the hackathon. It has amazing building and its facilities. There are times when it feels under the weather but it's part of college chime and feels good even then.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our university has good infrastructure. It has air-conditioned classrooms and full campus Wi-Fi connectivity. The labs are very well-equipped, and the teachers are very supportive, except for some of them. The hostels are good, but the mess could be improved. Medical facilities and all are good. There are grounds for cricket and football, as well as basketball and volleyball courts.

reviews.review_heading: The world is here. Where are you. My Sharda University.
reviews.review_text: The best thing about my college is its infrastructure. It feels like you are studying in an abroad college because the infrastructure is very good. The college provides different blocks for different courses and offers everything that students need in a college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university in Greater Noida. It has well-qualified teachers and a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In my point of view, facilities, and infrastructure are good compared to other colleges present in Greater Noida. It has 24x7 Wi-Fi with a nice download and upload speed. Labs and classroom are neat and clean with proper arrangements of things. Hostel facilities are good with proper and hygienic food. A healthy meal is served 3 times. There are its own medical facilities for students and it provides some discounts. Sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has great infrastructure, supportive faculty, and growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Sharda University is excellent. They provide various facilities, including a gaming zone, outdoor activities, and music areas. Unlimited Wi-Fi is available throughout the college campus. The labs are well-equipped, classrooms are clean, and the library is spacious. The hostel facilities are also very good, offering fresh food in the canteen, and the hostel rooms are maintained to a high standard. All sports and games are available here.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure and facilities. It has a brilliant environment inside the campus.
reviews.review_text: They provide throughout the university Wi-Fi facilities. They've provided enough classes with a projector and air conditioning system. They've also provided a lab for all the practical practices and also provided a well infrastructural library. The hostel is well-equipped with great quality food in the mess and canteen. They've also provided medical facilities, sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the placement. Top-notch infrastructure and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has top-notch infrastructure, with good classrooms, and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. It has separate grounds for cricket, football, basketball, and volleyball. It also provides hostel facilities for both boys and girls separately. All necessary items are available within the campus. Campus size is 67 acres. It also has an on-campus hospital.

reviews.review_heading: The university management can be a headache in many cases.
reviews.review_text: We have free Wi-Fi that runs throughout the whole university, There are many labs in the university. Classrooms are not that great but it is good. The library is the biggest highlight of the university. I have not stayed in the university hostel so I don't know much about it but according to my friends the hostel and mess is of average quality. The sports center is pretty good at Sharda university.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Sharda School of Engineering and Technology

likes.text: The companies like Tech Mahindra, Infosys, and many big companies visit the college for the placements.
The placements are good only for the good students like who have a good personality and with good technical knowledge.

likes.text: The infrastructure of our college is good with a big campus, hostels, library, canteen, auditorium, big halls, and classrooms.
The food in the hostel was pathetic and un-eatable at times, and the campus had multiple canteens which were good.

Very good faculty and very helpful teachers doing their best for each and every student to make their future better.

college_info.college_name: Sharda School of Engineering and Technology Scholarship Details

paragraphs: While filling out the SUAT application form, the candidates will be required to pay a fee to participate in the entrance exam and admission process. For the male candidates, the SUAT application fee is INR 1,500. Female candidates will be required to pay INR 1,000 as the application fee. Candidates will be able to pay the fee online i.e., through net banking/credit card/debit card and offline i.e., through a Demand Draft drawn in the favour of Sharda University payable at Greater Noida.

Yes. The candidates will be able to pay the SUAT application fee offline. To make the offline payment, the candidates will have to draw a demand draft in favour of Sharda University payable at Greater Noida. Candidates will have to write their name, father's name, contact number, and course opted for a the back of the demand draft and send it to the Admission Cell, Sharda University, Plot No. 32-34, Knowledge Park III, Greater Noida, UP - 201306. The fee can also be paid through cash at the Sharda University campus/regional offices.

Sharda School of Engineering and Technology BSc in Computer Science tuition fee is INR 3.59 lakh. This is the total course fee for three years. The fee structure can include tuition fee, security deposit, etc. Its need to be noted that the given fee is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is subject to revision and hence, is indicative.

Candiates opting for SET Sharda University transportation facility have to pay the facility cost. It shall be same for BSc and other course students. As per official website, the transportation fee for Noida is INR 52,000. Students can also get in touch with admission office for more details.

faqs.answer: FutureLearn and Coursera have a similar model of helping learners upskill with the latest courses and university partnerships. Affordability-wise, FutureLearn is better as it costs around INR 1100 per month, while Coursera costs around USD 49 (roughly INR 4500) per month. Another benefit of FutureLearn is that the certificates for its short-term courses online come with CPD credits. That can help freshers and professionals showcase on their LinkedIn profile or while pursuing their college education. While Coursera's certificates are globally known, they do not come with credits.

More career options in software development IT services, data Science and other fields are available to CSE graduates which frequently leads to placement rates. Even though it's a specialised field with increasing demand, jobs in cyber security are usually more
faqs.question: Which course has better placements at VGI, Greater Noida, B.Tech CSE or B.Tech Cyber Security?

faqs.answer: A:    VGI, Great Noida do not guarantee 100% placement for the MBA program, but it has good placement record. The placement rate normally has between 70 and 85% sucess rate, with top recruiters in finance, marketing, information technology, and human resources. MBA graduates earn an average salary of INR 3-4 LPA, with the highest packages of INR 8-10 LPA. Overall, the infrastructure is decent and supports both academics and student life well.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at VGI, Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can easily get direct admission at Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI), Greater Noida. Admissions at VGI are done on the basis of the candidate's academic merit from their most recent qualifying examination (10/12/graduation). Along with this, the institute also accepts scores from entrance examinations like CUET, UPCET, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc.

faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility requirement at VGI, Greater Noida for B.Sc?
faqs.answer: The minimum eligibility requirement for the B.Sc. program at Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI), Greater Noida, is completion of 12th with at least 33% marks. The total tuition fee for the B.Sc. program at VGI, Greater Noida, can range from INR 45K to INR 1.2 Lakh. There are a total of 360 seats available for this program.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for MBA at VGI, Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: The total intake forMBAis60seats.VGI Greater Noida offers two MBA programsMBA (Regular): A traditional MBA program.MBA Employability: Focused on enhancing employability skillsEligibility: Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent (10 + 2 + 3) in any discipline with minimum of 50% aggregate marks from a recognised Indian or foreign university.(45% for reserved category)Entrance Exam: MAT / XAT / CAT / UPSEECut off: 50 Percentile in Entrance Exams.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by VGI, Greater Noida for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: The Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI) in Greater Noida accepts scores from the following entrance exams for admission to its Master of Business Administration (MBA) program: CAT, XAT, MAT, CUET. To get admission in MBA at VGI, Greater Noida, you must appear for the CUET PG Exam, which is conducted every year by NTA.

hostel_campus.college_name: Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI) Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: About Visvesvaraya Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are Wi-Fi, full speed, and 24/7 availability. Labs are very big and well-cleaned and ventilated. Classrooms are also good and clean. A well-stocked library is present with all resources. The quality of facilities in my hostel is acceptable. The quality of food is good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities and sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: The name of my college is Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: I liked this college, I am doing B.A. here, and I liked the infrastructure here very much. The studies here are also very good, with a lot of internships. I am doing BBA from here, and it has taken me one year to do this course. It is very good to come here, and 60 percent is required for interns.

reviews.review_heading: It has decent academic support with a good campus. It needs more practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities for our department, including smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and well-equipped computer labs. The library is quiet and stocked with useful study materials. Hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The food in the mess is average. The canteen offers a better variety. Medical help is available on campus with a health center. Sports facilities, such as a playground and indoor games, are provided to encourage students' recreation. Overall, the infrastructure is...

reviews.review_heading: The best college, if you are financially not that well.
reviews.review_text: We have good infrastructure, Wi-Fi availability, classrooms are good, and proper hygiene is maintained. We have two libraries where more than 10 personal computers are there to learn and search things. High-speed internet is there all around the campus which is easily accessible.

reviews.review_heading: Review in the Shiksha by Rishabh Kaushik.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities were available in this course. The food quality in my college was so good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the upcoming best college in Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are all facilities for students they need like good labs and the library to study. The hostel facilities are also good. The hostel mess is very good and clean. The food is also good in taste.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: This course is awesome, according to me, because in this course, the college is offering great certifications which are very useful in any company to join. Certifications like Digital Marketing, Business Analyst, etc. And also, they provide proper training to the students who don't know how to prepare for interviews.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a short campus and average placements, but I am satisfied with our college life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working on some floors. Labs are outdated. The infrastructure at VGI is not good. Our classrooms are not very good. Faculty members' rooms are in poor condition. The library is very old. The food quality is average. Medical facilities are not great.

reviews.review_heading: VISHVESHWARYA GROUP OF INSTITUTIONS
reviews.review_text: The available facilities of my college are WiFi, library, classroom, computer labs, sports ground, and for mobile games, there is a gaming room, etc. The food and medical facilities are the best facilities of my college; there are sports tournaments in which cricket is the most entertaining part of our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI).
reviews.review_text:
Wifi, lab, canteen, proper library with all books available and smart classrooms are there in all classes. Regular practicals are provided and there is a very large class room. In the hostel, 2 fans, 3 almirahs, a big balcony, a bed, a window, wifi, and 2, 3, 4 and 1 all-seater are available.
Sports are regularly conducted in the evening.
Cricket , football, volleyball, table tennis, and many other games are available in the gym also.
4 times food is available, with different food every day.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college for B. Teach.
reviews.review_text: Our college is a totally Wi-Fi campus with decent speed. Labs are highly sophisticated with well-maintained equipment and machines. Our college also has a research lab. Our college has its own mess, which provides 3 meals a day and also snacks in the evening. The quality of food is decent and hygiene is maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The real experience of the campus .
reviews.review_text:
Wi-fi, 3-4 computer labs, 3 libraries, and 3 seminar halls are present on our campus.
Overall, the infrastructure is good, but there is room for improvement.
Hostel facilities for both boys and girls are provided separately. 
There is mess, gym, basketball court, and a common area for small celebrations like birthdays.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. They have good classrooms, Wi-Fi facilities, and the cafeteria even provides a good library with plenty of books. They have a digital library, and the labs are often updated with modern systems and software. The hostel provides good food and maintains hygiene. Even the canteen is good; they provide hygienic food. Sports and games are offered to encourage us in extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Reasons why I chose this university.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is accredited and Wi-Fi-enabled. The library has plenty of space and a large selection of books in various journals to study. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good but could be better. The hostels are okay, not too good .

reviews.review_heading: High experienced faculty .
reviews.review_text: We have extraordinary labs with highly updated tools and equipment. The daily lab practicals are done. The infrastructure available in the college is excellent, with huge ground to play. Some events are happening like farewells, freshers, events, etc.

paragraphs: Following are the fee structure for various courses offered by VGI, Greater Noida:-
Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions is one of the top institutes in Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh.
The Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions has recently conducted a placements drive for the 2024 passing out batch students and provides handsome salary packages.
Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions is also accepting applications from International Candidates for UG, PG, Diploma, and Certificate courses.
VGI, Greater Noida offered 100% Scholarships to eligible candidates based on their academic excellence and extracurricular achievements.
Record-breaking placements by Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions average salary package offered INR 6.2 LPA during the placement drive.
VGI, Greater Noida has world-class infrastructure facilities for students and staff.

Pursuing a B.Pharma at VGI, Great Noida costs around INR 1-1.2 Lacs annually. The four-year curriculum costs approximately upto INR 4 to 4.8 Lacs. This fee structure includes tuition, lab fees, and other like academic expenses. Additional usage costs may include hostel rooms, examination fees and study materials which could increase the total cost for this. VGI also provides the scholarships and financial aid based on the merit and their need, which helps the eligible students alleviate their financial burdens.

The placements of B.Sc. graduates can vary and are dependent on several factors, such as the institute's reputation, the student's academic performance, and the job market demand for professionals in the related fields. The average salary for B.Sc. in Agriculture at VGI, Greater Noida, is around INR 2.62 LPA, with the lowest package being INR 2.40 LPA. However, all B.Sc. graduates can expect an average salary ranging from INR 2.5 to INR 4.5 LPA.

Ali Yavar Jung National Institute of Speech and Hearing is better among all the other BASLP course-providing colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: This institute has a good campus area. Here we get good networks, well-planned classes, well-set labs, and a Case Hstory Room which is too good. The PTA room is well developed and is fully air-conditioned. Then we have a library which is very lovely. But there is no canteen here. There are lots of patients coming everyday.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Audiology - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied. Good placements, good labs, good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students got placements. The average package is 3,50,000/- PA. Amplifon India PVT ltd company is the top recruiting company. Audiologist and speech therapist are the roles offered. It is not easy to get seats for this course. Absolutely valuable course.
review_content.Infrastructure: There will be a Wi-Fi facility for lecturers. Department Labs are available. Audiology lab and speech therapy labs are available. Classrooms are also available for B.Ed BASLP M.Sc. ASLP. The library is also available. The hostel is available only for girls. Food is available in the mess, medical facilities are available, sports in the evening are played.

content.Placements: This course is divided into two departments: one is audiology and the other is speech language pathology.
